glosses.ja: 口頭の; 話し言葉の

translations.vi: Bài kiểm tra là vấn đáp.

tokens.explanation: Definite article in nominative feminine singular; determiner of 'Prüfung'.
Feminine noun; subject in nominative singular.
3rd person singular present of the copula; links subject to predicate.
Predicate adjective complement; describes the nature of the exam.

sentences.target: Wir klären das mündlich nach dem Meeting.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈklɛːʁən das ˈmʏntlɪç naːx deːm ˈmiːtɪŋ/

translations.de: Wir klären das mündlich nach dem Meeting.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈklɛːʁən das ˈmʏntlɪç naːx deːm ˈmiːtɪŋ/
translations.en: We’ll sort it out verbally after the meeting.
translations.es: Lo aclaramos después de la reunión.
translations.fr: On réglera ça en discutant après la réunion.
translations.it: Lo sistemiamo parlandone dopo la riunione.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们会在会后当面说清楚。
translations.pt: Vamos resolver isso depois da reunião, conversando.
translations.he: נדבר אחרי הפגישה ונפתור את זה.
translations.vi: Chúng ta sẽ bàn rồi giải quyết sau cuộc họp.
translations.nl: Na de vergadering praten we erover en lossen we het op.
translations.hu: A megbeszélés után megbeszéljük és elintézzük.
translations.hi: मीटिंग के बाद बात करके इसे सुलझा लेंगे।
translations.pl: Po spotkaniu porozmawiamy i to wyjaśnimy.
translations.el: Μετά τη συνάντηση θα το συζητήσουμε και θα το λύσουμε.
translations.nb: Etter møtet tar vi en prat og ordner det.
translations.id: Setelah rapat kita bicarakan dan bereskan.
translations.sv: Efter mötet pratar vi och löser det.
translations.cs: Po schůzce si o tom promluvíme a vyřešíme to.
translations.da: Efter mødet taler vi om det og får det løst.
translations.fi: Kokouksen jälkeen puhumme asiasta ja selvitämme sen.
translations.ja: 会議の後で話して解決しましょう。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural personal pronoun; subject in nominative.
Finite main verb in 1st person plural present; denotes the action.
Demonstrative pronoun in accusative; direct object of 'klären'.
Adverb of manner; specifies how the clarifying is done.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a temporal PP.
Definite article in dative singular; determiner of 'Meeting'.
Neuter noun; object of the preposition 'nach' (temporal complement).

sentences.target: Ich bestätige dir das heute noch mündlich.
sentences.reading: /ɪç bəˈʃtɛːtɪɡə diːɐ̯ das ˈhɔʏtə nɔx ˈmʏntlɪç/

translations.de: Ich bestätige dir das heute noch mündlich.
translations.ipa: /ɪç bəˈʃtɛːtɪɡə diːɐ̯ das ˈhɔʏtə nɔx ˈmʏntlɪç/
translations.en: I’ll confirm that to you verbally later today.
translations.es: Te lo confirmo hoy de palabra.
translations.fr: Je te le confirmerai de vive voix aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Oggi più tardi te lo confermo a voce.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天会口头向你确认。
translations.yue: 我今日會口頭同你確認。
translations.pt: Eu te confirmo isso hoje, verbalmente.
translations.he: אאשר לך את זה היום בעל פה.
translations.tr: Bunu sana bugün sözlü olarak onaylarım.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi sẽ xác nhận điều đó với bạn bằng lời.
translations.nl: Dat bevestig ik je vandaag nog mondeling.
translations.hi: मैं आज ही यह तुम्हें मौखिक रूप से पुष्टि कर दूँगा।
translations.el: Θα σου το επιβεβαιώσω σήμερα προφορικά.
translations.nb: Jeg bekrefter det for deg muntlig i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini saya akan mengonfirmasi itu secara lisan.
translations.sv: Jag bekräftar det muntligt för dig i dag.
translations.da: Jeg bekræfter det mundtligt til dig i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は口頭でその件をあなたに確認します。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun; subject in nominative.
1st person singular present; main verb expressing the act of confirming.
2nd person singular dative personal pronoun; indirect object.
Demonstrative pronoun in accusative; direct object of 'bestätige'.
Temporal adverb; indicates time of the action.
Focus/temporal adverb; conveys 'still/within today'.
Adverb of manner; specifies the mode of confirming.

sentences.target: Meine Chefin gibt die Anweisung mündlich weiter.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃɛfɪn ɡɪpt diː ˈanˌvaɪ̯zʊŋ ˈmʏntlɪç ˈvaɪ̯tɐ/

translations.de: Meine Chefin gibt die Anweisung mündlich weiter.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃɛfɪn ɡɪpt diː ˈanˌvaɪ̯zʊŋ ˈmʏntlɪç ˈvaɪ̯tɐ/
translations.en: My boss passes on the instruction verbally.
translations.es: Mi jefa transmite la instrucción de forma oral.
translations.fr: Ma cheffe transmet la consigne à l'oral.
translations.it: La mia capo comunica l'istruzione a voce.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的女上司口头传达指示。
translations.yue: 我嘅女上司口頭轉達指示。
translations.pt: Minha chefe repassa a instrução verbalmente.
translations.he: המנהלת שלי מעבירה את ההנחיה בעל פה.
translations.vi: Sếp của tôi truyền đạt chỉ thị bằng miệng.
translations.nl: Mijn baas geeft de instructie mondeling door.
translations.hu: A főnöknőm szóban adja tovább az utasítást.
translations.hi: मेरी बॉस निर्देश मौखिक रूप से देती हैं।
translations.el: Η προϊσταμένη μου μεταβιβάζει την οδηγία προφορικά.
translations.nb: Sjefen min gir instruksen muntlig videre.
translations.id: Atasan saya meneruskan instruksi secara lisan.
translations.sv: Min chef för vidare instruktionen muntligt.
translations.ja: 上司は指示を口頭で伝えます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; agrees with feminine singular 'Chefin'.
Feminine noun; subject in nominative singular.
3rd person singular present; part of separable verb 'weitergeben'.
Definite article; determiner of 'Anweisung'.
Feminine noun; direct object in accusative singular.
Adverb of manner; indicates the instruction is conveyed verbally.
Separable verb particle; forms 'weitergeben' ('to pass on').
